subcodes.first_line: O physician! The body of thy world hath fallen grievously ill, its malady chronic and complete. O skilled physician and surpassing sage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طبیبا جسم عالمک صحتی مختل و علتی مزمن و مکمل اولمشدر طبیب حاذق و حکیم فائق و
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @love of God
